creator: boris.tassou@securmail.fr
text:
Hi,

I still have the problem :

[root@rda ~]# freebsd-update upgrade -r 12.2-RELEASE -v debug
src component not installed, skipped
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 3 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 12.1-RELEASE from update4.freebsd.org... 
latest.ssl                                             512  B 2335 kBps    00s
done.
Fetching metadata index... 
a78662fabf48fd2503fb500d264ddfd8ff29c8a0a3caf8         225  B  633 kBps    00s
done.
Fetching 2 metadata files... 
/usr/libexec/phttpget update4.freebsd.org 12.1-RELEASE/amd64/m/8f386918835e40bf937092581c81872b6955c2d4b05101cf1c32e65ca177fb78.gz 12.1-RELEASE/amd64/m/d8cbdedc12338b1025b342b96b8d5d5b66547d1847ed8b0af17bb155c48a9b77.gz
http://update4.freebsd.org/12.1-RELEASE/amd64/m/8f386918835e40bf937092581c81872b6955c2d4b05101cf1c32e65ca177fb78.gz: 404 Error (ignored)
http://update4.freebsd.org/12.1-RELEASE/amd64/m/d8cbdedc12338b1025b342b96b8d5d5b66547d1847ed8b0af17bb155c48a9b77.gz: 200 OK
failed.
